suberas.name: Primordial & Creator Age
suberas.description: Creation myths, primordials, gods shape the world; earliest sentient races emerge.

suberas.name: Age of First Empires
suberas.description: Sarrukh, Batrachi, and Aearee dominate; proto-civilizations rise and fall.

suberas.name: Age of Elven Dominance
suberas.description: Elven high magic realms flourish (Aryvandaar, Miyeritar, Ilythiir conflicts).

suberas.name: Age of Early Human Kingdoms
suberas.description: Netheril, Imaskar, and Jhaamdath rise; human arcane empires dominate.

suberas.name: Age of Arcane Empires
suberas.description: Netheril at its peak; Imaskar declines; powerful magic reshapes the world.

suberas.name: Age of Cataclysm
suberas.description: Fall of Netheril; magical disasters; collapse of major ancient civilizations.

suberas.name: Dawn of Recorded History
suberas.description: Dalereckoning begins; regional kingdoms stabilize; post-cataclysm recovery.

suberas.name: Rise of Regional Kingdoms
suberas.description: Cormyr, early Greyhawk states, and Mystaran empires consolidate power.

suberas.name: Age of Expansion
suberas.description: Kingdoms expand; trade routes flourish; feudal systems dominate.

suberas.name: Age of Intrigue
suberas.description: Political fragmentation, espionage, and regional conflicts intensify.

suberas.name: Age of Turmoil
suberas.description: Major conflicts across settings; instability rises.

suberas.name: Spellplague Era
suberas.description: Magical catastrophe reshapes reality (Forgotten Realms-specific but widely mapped).

suberas.name: Second Sundering
suberas.description: Worlds stabilize; divine order restored; geography partially resets.

suberas.name: Contemporary Age
suberas.description: Default 5e timeline; active adventuring era across most settings.

suberas.name: Age of Arcanum (Exandria)
suberas.description: Floating cities, extreme magical advancement.

suberas.name: The Calamity (Exandria)
suberas.description: Gods war; civilizations collapse.

suberas.name: Post-Calamity Era (Exandria)
suberas.description: Rebuilding of mortal civilizations.

suberas.name: Age of Demons (Eberron)
suberas.description: Fiends dominate before dragon intervention.

suberas.name: Age of Giants (Eberron)
suberas.description: Giant empires dominate Xen’drik.

suberas.name: Age of Monsters (Eberron)
suberas.description: Dhakaani Empire and other non-human powers rise.

suberas.name: Age of Galifar (Eberron)
suberas.description: Unified kingdom dominates Khorvaire.

suberas.name: Last War (Eberron)
suberas.description: Massive continental war.

suberas.name: Current Age (Eberron)
suberas.description: Post-war tension; unstable peace.

suberas.name: Age of Despair (Dragonlance)
suberas.date_range: Cataclysm to War of the Lance
suberas.description: Gods withdraw; world declines.

suberas.name: Age of Mortals (Dragonlance)
suberas.description: Mortal-driven world order.

suberas.name: Green Age (Dark Sun)
suberas.description: Lush world before arcane devastation.

suberas.name: Brown Age (Dark Sun)
suberas.description: Ecological collapse begins.

suberas.name: Age of Sorcerer-Kings (Dark Sun)
suberas.description: City-states ruled by tyrants.
